rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into implementation scope when binding to subcomponent ports or implementation-level conditions.
Place input/output range contracts in component type scope only when using visible, typed ports with concrete bounds.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structure by aligning AGREE annex scope with the component’s type or implementation boundary.
Do not reference subcomponent paths in component type contracts; use only visible features.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Use bool-typed expressions for range comparisons, not direct integer or real literals without explicit typing.
anti_patterns: Avoid referencing AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not convert Boolean or enumeration ports into numeric range comparisons unless explicitly typed as scalars in AADL.
